messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao on-premises. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Oracle Cloud at Customer

### O que e

- OCI em seu datacenter
- Same OCI console/API
- Dedicated hardware

### Beneficios

- Data sovereignty
- Low latency
- Same services OCI public
- Pay per use

### Use Cases

- Regulatory requirements
- Latency-sensitive
- Existing infrastructure

### Compared to OCI

| Aspect | OCI Public | Cloud@Customer |
|--------|------------|----------------|
| Location | Oracle DC | Your DC |
| Latency | Low | Ultra-low |
| Management | Oracle | Oracle |
| Upgrades | Auto | Scheduled |

### Pricing

- Subscription-based
- Like OCI public
